title: Metrics Analyst 3.0 — Single-Request Dashboard Analysis
story: As a data analyst, I want Metrics Analyst to process an entire dashboard in a single AI request, so that analysis is faster and more cost-effective.
description:
Next iteration of Metrics Analyst that consolidates dashboard analysis into a single AI request instead of multiple calls.

### Token Economics
- Model context window limit: 128,000 tokens
- Typical dashboard input: 10,000–20,000 tokens
- Cost per 1M input tokens: $0.15
- Estimated cost per dashboard analysis: ~$0.000255–$0.00225

This is an early-stage planning ticket. Implementation deferred to a later sprint.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics Analyst processes a full dashboard in a single AI request
Dashboard input stays within the 128K token context window
ux_changes: Updated Metrics Analyst interface for single-request dashboard analysis flow.
middleware_changes: Consolidates multiple AI API calls into a single request per dashboard, bundling all dashboard metadata within the token limit.
api_changes: Refactored AI API integration to send a single prompt with full dashboard context rather than per-component requests.
implementation_notes: Deferred to February/March timeframe. Token budget analysis shows dashboards fit well within the 128K context window at low cost.
comment_summary: Waqar asked for clarification on the task. Ryan indicated the work is not ready yet and is planned for a later sprint (February or March).
